title: Campfire Creations
description: Combine a stick with your favourite ingredients and cook them over a campfire to create a variety of delicious skewers
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1364ff6d90632070e77ac981f69019a261de8bec.png)

![NeoForge](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/neoforge.png) ![Forge](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/forge.png) ![Fabric](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/fabric.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UFKGiIMfsiQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

You are out for an adventure, the sun is going down. Your hunger bar is low.
You’ve got a campfire, a stick… and whatever you managed to gather.

That's all you need to skewer yourself up some flavor. 

# Survival Cooking, Over a Campfire

Campfire Creations lets you skewer almost anything edible and cook it over a campfire.

Meat, fish, mushrooms, vegetables if you can eat it, you can probably skewer it.

Out in the wild, you don’t need a kitchen.  
Just a fire… and something to put on it.

# Types of Skewer

## Basic Skewers

Simple, reliable, and made from whatever you have on hand.

| Fish Skewer | Meaty Skewer | Mushroom Skewer |
| ---- | ---- | ---- |
| Fish Skewers can be made from any Fish. | Meaty Skewers can be made from any Meat. | Mushroom Skewers can be made from any Mushroom. |
| ![Fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e87003fac03f42ca4e2b4978c52c993a9f63fbf.gif) | ![Meaty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39d66ec5c7cc63d32061b68e1646afd50b30ded7.gif) | ![Mushroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47b0b8d6e48b40990668b0bcb6708e2cd5da8850.gif) |

| Vegetable Skewer | Suspicious Skewer | Fruity Skewer |
| ---- | ---- | ---- |
| Vegetable Skewers can be made from any Vegetable | Suspicious Skewers are made from questionable ingredients and monster scraps. Probably not safe… but it might save your life. | Fruity Skewers are made from any Fruit |
| ![Veg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d84a55f1dc56886f6193b4fe27b1e3225c27083.gif) | ![sus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b5a3a30e409a395bba9da8873e7c379230656f.gif) | ![fruit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aafd4e08f61246c1c0b4d9689c5f429303c83b01.gif) |

| Cactus Skewer | Seaweed Skewer | Dough Skewer |
| ---- | ---- | ---- |
| Cactus Skewers are made from cactus. Definitely don’t try eating it raw.| Seaweed Skewers can be crafted from two pieces of Kelp. | Dough Skewers are made from wheat and cook into Campfire Bread. |
| ![cac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3c1e3d12b208c9df778aaaf9a82bcb8a2773e88.png) | ![sea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a161000345ff7f860a65b3d00e03a44bcbfa467.png) | ![wheat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/278ea4f826be51afe55b6db60705ac8666c0fa6e.png) |

## Combo Skewers 

Combine ingredients to create more filling meals with added benefits.

| Hearty Skewer | Surf N' Turf Skewer | Meaty Mushroom Skewer |
| ---- | ---- | ---- |
| A filling mix of meat and vegetables. Provides a brief regeneration and absorption boost. | Surf N' Turf Skewers can be crafted with any Fish plus any Meat. | Meaty Mushroom Skewers can be crafted with any Mushroom plus any Meat. | 
| ![hearty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e540840c0e3f410c55fbc826c57ac5fbea0ea286.gif) | ![surf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f2d3924bbc33f2e69ab7994f30d6bede04160d.gif) | ![meaty mushroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73f5f2f6dccedcbdfe1e1e7dcac06b627fedb8ed.gif) |

| Hearty Vegetarian Skewer | Honey Chicken Skewer | Salty Sea Skewer |
| ---- | ---- | ---- |
| Hearty Vegetarian Skewers can be crafted with any vegetables plus any fruit or mushrooms. | Honey Chicken Skewers can be crafted with a piece of Chicken plus a Bottle of Honey. | Fish and kelp cooked together. Grants a short burst of water breathing.
| ![hearty veg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/151845934bfa382cb8b750422fcaa9c27a369086.gif) | ![Honey Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c54f3fe2819e9b9127d5c92b7445d44b64049695.png) | ![salty sea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44b0689039d560b78e2a852567e878ebe7240ccd.gif) |

Place the fire.
Skewer your food.
Survive the night.

***
